releaseNotes:
1.0.3: Home dashboard — clearer Movies / TV Series labels, compact tile layout, Sports slate count + TODAY row (no clipping), improved contrast on game counts. Player — refined control bar styling, vector play/seek icons. Performance — safer main-thread handling for nav restore, telemetry, and frame logging.

Earlier: 1.0.2 series/catalog fixes; player settings; guide & sports improvements.
